user.title: Connect to Smart Wine Cellar
user.description: Enter your Smart Wine Cellar API token. You can generate one at [smartwinecellar.xyz/settings#/api](https://smartwinecellar.xyz/settings#/api).

data_description.api_token: Your personal API token from the app settings
data_description.scan_interval: How often to push sensor readings (5–60 minutes)

sensor_mapping.title: Map your sensors
sensor_mapping.description: Select a Home Assistant temperature sensor (and optionally a humidity sensor) for each Smart Wine Cellar location. Leave a location blank to skip it.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach Smart Wine Cellar. Check your network connection.
error.no_mappings: No sensors were mapped. Please assign at least one temperature sensor.
error.subscription_required: Your Smart Wine Cellar account does not have an active subscription.

abort.already_configured: Smart Wine Cellar is already configured.

init.title: Smart Wine Cellar settings
init.description: Update the sync interval, then reassign your sensors on the next screen.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to push sensor readings (5–60 minutes)

sensor_mapping.title: Re-map your sensors
sensor_mapping.description: Update the Home Assistant sensors for each Smart Wine Cellar location. Your current selections are pre-filled.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach Smart Wine Cellar. Check your network connection.
error.no_mappings: No sensors were mapped. Please assign at least one temperature sensor.
